    R

    random() - Static method in enum class entity.IceCreamFlavor
    Random ice cream flavor
    random() - Static method in enum class logic.MenuType
    Selects a random MenuType.
    randomNewOrder() - Method in class logic.GameInstance
    Add new order to the orders ArrayList
    REAL_GAME_DURATION - Static variable in class logic.GameInstance
    Time in second in real life for a single day in a game.
    reduceIngredientInStock(ItemSpriteType, int) - Method in class logic.GameInstance
    Reducing the amount of item specified by itemType parameter in the stock according to amount parameter.
    reducePlayerCash(int) - Method in class logic.GameInstance
    Reduce player's cash by a specific amount.
    removeAllItem() - Method in class logic.counters.BaseCounter
    Removes all items from the counter.
    removeItem(ItemSprite) - Method in class gui.room.Room
    Remove ItemSprite from this room.
    removeItem(ItemSprite) - Method in class logic.counters.BaseCounter
    Removes an item from the counter.
    REPEAT_LAST - Enum constant in enum class util.wrapper.BackgroundMusicTrack.TrackMode
    Repeat last mode.
    RequireContainer - Interface in logic.menus
    Interface for menus that require a container.
    requiredContainer - Variable in class logic.menus.BaconSalad
    The required container for this menu.
    requiredContainers - Variable in class logic.menus.BreakfastSet
    The required containers for the breakfast set.
    requiredContainers - Variable in class logic.menus.SatisfactoryMeal
    The required containers for this menu.
    requiredContainers - Variable in class logic.menus.Spaghetti
    The required containers for this menu.
    resetInstance() - Static method in class logic.GameInstance
    Reset current instance and restart timer.
    resetRoom() - Method in class gui.room.BackdoorRoom
    Reset the room by clearing all ItemSprites in the room
    and updating the item dropper stock amount that increased due to player's ingredient order to the shop.
    resetRoom() - Method in class gui.room.ColdZoneRoom
    Reset the room by clearing all ItemSprites in the room
    and reset the milk supply of the Ice Cream Machine to 0
    resetRoom() - Method in class gui.room.Room
    Reset the room by clearing all ItemSprites in the room.
    resetUi() - Static method in class gui.GameScene
    Reset UI by Update Timer UI Update Cash UI Update day count Remove all order paper inside HUD Remove return to main menu panel from HUD Remove sleep confirmation panel from HUD Reset shop's ingredient order UI Close unclosed PC shop UI and Cookbook UI Set Cookbook UI index to 0
    resetUi() - Static method in class gui.SummaryMenu
    Resets the tutorial UI to its initial state.
    resetUi() - Static method in class gui.TutorialScene
    Resets the tutorial UI to its initial state.
    returnButtonOnClick(MouseEvent) - Method in class gui.SettingsMenu
    Handles the return button click event.
    returnPane - Variable in class gui.GameScene
    The confirmation pane for returning to the main menu.
    RIGHT - Enum constant in enum class logic.WalkDirection
    Right direction.
    room - Static variable in class gui.room.BackdoorRoom
    The singleton instance of the Backdoor Room.
    room - Static variable in class gui.room.BedRoom
    The singleton instance of the Bed Room.
    room - Static variable in class gui.room.ColdZoneRoom
    The singleton instance of the Cold Zone Room.
    room - Static variable in class gui.room.HotZoneRoom
    The singleton instance of the Hot Zone Room.
    room - Static variable in class gui.room.ServingRoom
    The singleton instance of the Serving Room.
    Room - Class in gui.room
    Base class of all room UI
    Room(String, String) - Constructor for class gui.room.Room
    Constructs a new Room.
    rooms - Variable in class logic.GameInstance
    List of all rooms.
    runAfter() - Method in class gui.GameScene
     
    runAfter() - Method in interface gui.RunAfterChange
    method called by SceneManager after the scene is changed to the RunAfterChange Scene.
    runAfter() - Method in class gui.SummaryMenu
     
    runAfter() - Method in class gui.TutorialScene
     
    RunAfterChange - Interface in gui
    Interface for Scene that need some part of a code to be run immediately after changed the scene.
    The method runAfter() will be called by SceneManager.
    runNewThread(Runnable) - Static method in class util.ThreadManager
    Creates and immediately runs a new thread with the given runnable.
